name: Subdivide POP
description: The Subdivide POP subdivides and smooths a surface. It divides each quad into two triangles, and then for each triangle subdivides it into 4 triangles cutting at the midpoint of each edge. The pre-existing and new points are blended with their neighbors to produce a more smooth surface. Increasing the Depth recurses several times in multiple passes, where the result of a pass is subdivided further in the next pass. Increasing the Crease Weight parameter toward 1 restores the original shape more, so this is a suitable method to simply subdivide faces as you may want with a Box POP.

parameters.name: Depth
parameters.label: Depth
parameters.description: Sets the number of iterations to subdivide. Higher numbers give a smoother surface.

parameters.name: Crease Weight
parameters.label: Crease Weight
parameters.description: Determines how much sharp edges in the geometry should be preserved

parameters.name: Simple Coefficients
parameters.label: Simple Coefficients
parameters.description: Enables simple coefficient computation when smoothing the interpolated points.

parameters.name: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.label: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.description: Enable copying the point count and topology information held on the GPU to the CPU.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Subdivide_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
